operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition Gateway OPC Connections page shows current connection status
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that within the Ignition Gateway UI, navigating under Config > OPC > OPC Connections allows viewing the current connections.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Under Config, OPC, OPC Connections you can view the current connections.'
Slide title: 'Ignition Gateway UI / you can view the current connections.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In Ignition Gateway UI, the Config > OPC > OPC Connections area is used to view current connections.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Powered-off tippers may appear as Faulted in OPC connections view
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The example on the slide shows that when tipper 7 and tipper 8 are powered off, their connection status is displayed as Faulted in the OPC Connections view.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'In this example both tipper 7 and 8 are powered off and show Faulted.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the Ignition Gateway OPC Connections view, powered-off devices such as tipper 7 and tipper 8 may show a Faulted status.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Navigate to OPC Connections to check current connection status
preconditions: Access to the Ignition Gateway UI is available.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide text references the Ignition Gateway UI navigation path Config > OPC > OPC Connections for viewing current connections.

steps.instruction: In the Ignition Gateway UI, open Config.
steps.validation_check: Config is selected in the Ignition Gateway UI.
steps.visual_region_hint: Ignition Gateway UI navigation path referenced in slide text

steps.instruction: Under Config, open OPC, then select OPC Connections.
steps.expected_outcome: The OPC Connections page is displayed.
steps.validation_check: The UI is showing current connections.
steps.visual_region_hint: Config > OPC > OPC Connections path referenced in slide text

warnings: The slide provides only the navigation path and viewing purpose; it does not provide additional diagnostic or corrective steps.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: To check current connections in Ignition Gateway UI, navigate to Config > OPC > OPC Connections. The slide also notes that powered-off tippers can appear as Faulted in this view.
